title: Frýdek-Místek, Moravia-Silesia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Frýdek-Místek, Moravia-Silesia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Frýdek-Místek is a city in Moravia-Silesia with a population of 55,000. A twin city at the foot of the Beskydy Mountains, blending Silesian and Moravian culture with excellent hiking and outdoor access.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
